title: Lei Shuo's Blog
subTitle: Welcome to my personal blog
script: <script src='https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/view-image.js@2.0.0/view-image.min.js'></script><script src='//busuanzi.ibruce.info/busuanzi/2.3/busuanzi.pure.mini.js'></script><script>document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',function(){var s=document.createElement('style');s.innerHTML='/* 1. 全局布局重置 */ body{margin:0;padding:0;overflow-x:hidden;} /* 2. 背景层 */ #bg-layer{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;z-index:-999;background:linear-gradient(45deg,#ff9a9e 0%,#fad0c4 99%,#fad0c4 100%);background-size:400% 400%;animation:gradient 15s ease infinite;} @keyframes gradient{0%{background-position:0% 50%}50%{background-position:100% 50%}100%{background-position:0% 50%}} /* 3. 强制左侧目录显示 */ #inject-sidebar{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;bottom:0;width:280px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.95);border-right:1px solid #eee;z-index:999999;overflow-y:auto;padding:20px;box-shadow:2px 0 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);display:flex;flex-direction:column;} /* 4. 强制文章内容右移 (关键!) */ .markdown-body, .FileList { margin-left: 300px !important; width: calc(100% - 340px) !important; max-width: none !important; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.9) !important; border-radius: 10px; padding: 30px !important; margin-top: 20px !important; margin-bottom: 20px !important; } .Header, .footer { margin-left: 300px !important; width: calc(100% - 340px) !important; background: transparent !important; } /* 搜索框 */ #sidebar-search{width:100%;padding:12px;margin-bottom:20px;border:2px solid #ddd;border-radius:8px;outline:none;transition:0.3s;} #sidebar-search:focus{border-color:#ff9a9e;background:#fff;} /* 目录链接 */ .sidebar-item{display:block;padding:10px;color:#333;text-decoration:none;border-radius:6px;margin-bottom:5px;font-size:14px;transition:0.2s;} .sidebar-item:hover{background:#ff9a9e;color:white;transform:translateX(5px);} .sidebar-group{font-weight:bold;margin-top:20px;margin-bottom:10px;color:#555;border-bottom:2px solid #fad0c4;padding-bottom:5px;} /* 手机端适配 */ @media (max-width: 1000px) { #inject-sidebar { transform: translateX(-100%); transition: transform 0.3s; } #inject-sidebar.open { transform: translateX(0); } .markdown-body, .FileList, .Header, .footer { margin-left: 10px !important; width: calc(100% - 20px) !important; } #menu-trigger { display: block !important; } } #menu-trigger { display: none; position: fixed; left: 20px; bottom: 20px; width: 50px; height: 50px; background: #ff9a9e; color: white; border-radius: 50%; text-align: center; line-height: 50px; font-size: 24px; z-index: 1000000; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); }';document.head.appendChild(s);/* 生成背景 */ var bg=document.createElement('div');bg.id='bg-layer';document.body.appendChild(bg);/* 生成目录容器 */ var nav=document.createElement('div');nav.id='inject-sidebar';document.body.appendChild(nav);/* 生成手机菜单按钮 */ var btn=document.createElement('div');btn.id='menu-trigger';btn.innerHTML='☰';btn.onclick=function(){nav.classList.toggle('open')};document.body.appendChild(btn);/* 初始化插件 */ window.ViewImage && ViewImage.init('.markdown-body img');/* 获取数据 */ fetch('/blogBase.json').then(r=>r.json()).then(d=>{/* 搜索框 */ var inp=document.createElement('input');inp.id='sidebar-search';inp.placeholder='🔍 搜索文章...';inp.oninput=function(e){var v=e.target.value.toLowerCase();nav.querySelectorAll('.sidebar-item').forEach(i=>{i.style.display=i.innerText.toLowerCase().includes(v)?'block':'none'})};nav.appendChild(inp);/* 博客标题 */ var h=document.createElement('h3');h.innerText='📚 导航';h.style.margin='0 0 15px 0';nav.appendChild(h);/* 渲染列表 */ var map={};Object.values(d).forEach(p=>{var l=p.labels[0]||'未分类';if(!map[l])map[l]=[];map[l].push(p)});Object.keys(map).sort().forEach(k=>{var t=document.createElement('div');t.className='sidebar-group';t.innerText=k;nav.appendChild(t);map[k].forEach(p=>{var a=document.createElement('a');a.className='sidebar-item';a.href=p.postUrl;a.innerText=p.postTitle;nav.appendChild(a)})});}).catch(e=>console.log(e));});</script>
